signals.headline: Polymarket Confirms Bitcoin Hit ↑$75,000 in April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket Confirms Bitcoin Hit ↑$75,000 in April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's "What price will Bitcoin hit in April?" market resolves with "↑ 75,000" at 100% probability, indicating Bitcoin has reached or exceeded this level during April, as shares priced at 100¢ imply certain resolution upon hitting the threshold[4][3].  
This confirmation aligns with recent price action above $

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Signaling Hawkish Shift Amid Stable Inflation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Signaling Hawkish Shift Amid Stable Inflation | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump announced Kevin Warsh, a former Fed governor viewed as an **inflation hawk** opposing quantitative easing and favoring higher rates, as his pick to succeed Jerome Powell following a recent Fed meeting.[1][2][3]
